events.title: Monthly rent due
events.computation: Recurring monthly on the 1st; first occurrence within lease term is the lease start date 2026-09-01

recurrence.description: Rent of $1,595.00 due on the first day of each month

events.source_excerpt: Tenant agrees to pay rent of $1,595.00 per month, due on the first day of each month.
events.details: Rent of $1,595.00 is due on the first day of each month for the duration of the lease term.

events.title: Late fee applies if rent unpaid after grace period
events.computation: Recurring monthly obligation tied to each month's rent due date plus 5 days; no single calendar date applies since it recurs monthly

recurrence.description: If rent is not received within 5 days after the due date (the 1st), a $50 late fee applies, roughly the 6th of each month

events.source_excerpt: If rent is not received within five (5) days after the due date, Tenant shall pay a late fee of $50.00.
events.details: A $50.00 late fee applies if rent is not received within five days after the monthly due date; a returned payment incurs an additional $35.00 fee.

events.title: Lease non-renewal notice deadline
events.source_excerpt: Tenant must deliver written notice of non-renewal to Landlord at least sixty (60) days before the end of the lease term.
events.details: If Tenant does not intend to renew, written notice of non-renewal must be delivered to Landlord at least 60 days before the lease term ends, or a $200.00 holdover administration fee applies.

events.title: Landlord renewal offer window opens (Anniversary Date)
events.computation: needs: Anniversary Date (as defined in the Master Property Schedule, not provided in this document); window opens on that date

resolution.anchor_label: Anniversary Date (defined in Master Property Schedule)

events.source_excerpt: Landlord will deliver a written renewal offer to Tenant within thirty (30) days after the Anniversary Date, as that term is defined in the Master Property Schedule maintained by Landlord.
events.details: Landlord must deliver a written renewal offer to Tenant within 30 days after the Anniversary Date; the Anniversary Date is defined in a separate document (Master Property Schedule) not included here.

events.title: Landlord renewal offer deadline
events.computation: needs: Anniversary Date (as defined in the Master Property Schedule, not provided in this document); then add 30 days

resolution.anchor_label: Anniversary Date (defined in Master Property Schedule)

events.source_excerpt: Landlord will deliver a written renewal offer to Tenant within thirty (30) days after the Anniversary Date, as that term is defined in the Master Property Schedule maintained by Landlord.
events.details: Landlord must deliver a written renewal offer to Tenant no later than 30 days after the Anniversary Date; the Anniversary Date itself is not defined within this document.

events.title: Move-out inspection
events.source_excerpt: A move-out inspection is scheduled for September 1, 2027 at the Premises.
events.details: A move-out inspection is scheduled at the Premises; Tenant may be present and should ensure the Premises are returned to move-in condition, less normal wear and tear.

events.title: Security deposit return deadline
events.source_excerpt: The deposit will be returned within thirty (30) days after the move-out inspection, less any lawful deductions for damage beyond normal wear and tear, unpaid rent, or required cleaning.
events.details: The security deposit of $1,595.00 must be returned within 30 days after the move-out inspection, less any lawful deductions.

events.title: Lease term ends
events.source_excerpt: The term of this lease is twelve (12) months, beginning on September 1, 2026 and ending on August 31, 2027.
events.details: The lease term ends on this date; at the end of the term, the lease ends unless both parties sign a new agreement.

events.title: Landlord entry notice requirement
events.computation: This is a recurring/standing requirement with no fixed date; applies each time Landlord seeks entry
events.source_excerpt: Landlord may enter the Premises to make repairs, conduct inspections, or show the property, after providing at least twenty-four (24) hours' written notice, except in an emergency.
events.details: Landlord must provide at least 24 hours' written notice before entering the Premises, except in an emergency. This is a standing requirement without a specific calendar date.

ambiguities: The Anniversary Date referenced in Section 5 (Renewal Offer) is defined in a separate 'Master Property Schedule' document not provided here, so the renewal offer window's opening and closing dates cannot be computed.
The exact recurring late-fee trigger date is approximate (5 days after the 1st of each month) since it depends on the actual rent due date each month.

events.title: Scholarship acceptance form due
events.source_excerpt: You must sign and return the enclosed acceptance form no later than August 15, 2026.
events.details: Signed acceptance form must be returned by this date or the award is released to the alternate list.

events.title: Proof of full-time enrollment due
events.source_excerpt: You must submit proof of full-time enrollment to the Foundation within fourteen (14) days after the start of the fall semester.
events.details: A registrar's letter or official enrollment certificate confirming full-time enrollment must be submitted to the Foundation.

events.title: Annual GPA transcript due
events.computation: Recurring annual deadline of June 30; next upcoming occurrence after 2026-07-01 is 2027-06-30 (the 2026-06-30 date has already passed).
events.source_excerpt: you must submit an official transcript demonstrating a cumulative GPA of 3.25 or higher by June 30 of each year that you hold the scholarship
events.details: An official transcript showing a cumulative GPA of 3.25 or higher must be submitted each year to remain eligible for renewal.

events.title: Scholarship disbursement to institution

recurrence.description: twice yearly, at the start of each semester (fall and spring)

events.source_excerpt: The award is disbursed directly to your institution in two equal installments at the start of each semester.
events.details: Funds are automatically disbursed to the recipient's institution at the start of each semester; no recipient action is required.

events.title: Priority housing grant application deadline (closed)
events.source_excerpt: the priority housing grant application associated with this program closed on June 1, 2026, and late applications are not accepted
events.details: This application window has already closed and late applications are not accepted; provided for informational purposes only.

events.title: Notify Foundation of enrollment status change
events.computation: needs: date of any change in enrollment status (reduction below full-time, leave of absence, or transfer); then add 30 days

resolution.anchor_label: Date of change in enrollment status

events.source_excerpt: You must notify the Foundation in writing within thirty (30) days of any change in your enrollment status, including a reduction below full-time status, a leave of absence, or a transfer to another institution.
events.details: Written notice to the Foundation is required within 30 days of any enrollment status change, such as dropping below full-time, taking a leave of absence, or transferring institutions.

ambiguities: The enrollment status change notification deadline cannot be computed because the document does not specify when (or if) such a change occurs; the 30-day window would start from the actual date of the change.
The exact GPA report submission dates for years beyond 2027 are recurring annually but only the pattern is given, not individual future compliance dates.

events.title: Monthly premium installment due
events.computation: Next occurrence on or after 2026-07-01 of monthly due date (15th) = 2026-07-15

recurrence.description: Monthly on the 15th day of each month

events.source_excerpt: Your total premium for the policy period is $744.00, payable in monthly installments of $124.00 due on the fifteenth (15th) day of each month.
events.details: A premium installment of $124.00 is due on the 15th of each month during the policy period.

events.title: Grace period ends for missed installment
events.computation: needs: specific missed installment due date; then add 10 days
events.source_excerpt: If an installment is not received by its due date, coverage continues during a ten (10) day grace period.
events.details: If a monthly installment is not paid by its due date, coverage continues for a 10-day grace period after which cancellation for non-payment may occur.

events.title: Deadline for policyholder cancellation notice to avoid short-rate penalty
events.source_excerpt: To avoid a short-rate cancellation penalty, written notice of cancellation must be received at least thirty (30) days before the policy expiration date.
events.details: Written notice of cancellation must be received by this date to avoid a short-rate cancellation penalty.

events.title: Renewal offer mailed by insurer
events.source_excerpt: A renewal offer, including any premium changes, will be mailed to your address on file on or before December 1, 2026.
events.details: The insurer will mail a renewal offer, including any premium changes, on or before this date.

events.title: Policy expiration / automatic renewal date
events.source_excerpt: Your policy is effective from July 15, 2026 through January 14, 2027. Coverage ends at 12:01 a.m. on the expiration date unless the policy is renewed.
events.details: The current policy period ends on this date; if no action is taken, the policy renews automatically on the terms of the renewal offer.

ambiguities: The exact due dates for each monthly installment beyond the recurring pattern are not individually listed, so the grace period end date cannot be resolved to a specific calendar date without knowing which installment is missed.
The document does not specify a numeric deadline for reporting claims ("promptly" is undefined), so no dated event could be extracted for claims reporting.
